extension.news:
v1.0.0~beta4 (2026-07-16) - Unlearned stream profiles now reset the audio offset to 0 once the addon has acted, instead of letting a previous stream's offset stick - "Offset not saved" notification when an unstored manual adjustment is discarded by that reset - The manage-offsets view returns to the addon settings when closed and gains a "Back to settings" row
v1.0.0~beta3 (2026-07-15) - Log lines now use the AOMe_ prefix so Evolved is distinguishable from classic AOM in a shared kodi.log
v1.0.0~beta2 (2026-07-15) - Fix toast rendering: the saved/applied line is now the notification title (no more scrolling/truncated single line) - Toasts omit the frame rate while per-refresh-rate offsets are disabled (the value is stored for all rates) - Display name for TrueHD Atmos
v1.0.0~beta1 (2026-07-15) - First beta of AOM Evolved (local test build; never published) - Learn loop: manual offset adjustments are remembered per stream profile and re-applied automatically - Sparse JSON offset store with per-refresh-rate toggle, verbatim format acceptance - Management view (settings button): inspect and remove learned offsets - One-time warning when the classic Audio Offset Manager is also enabled
extension.summary: Fix lipsync once — Evolved remembers it per stream profile
extension.description: Adjust Kodi's audio offset during playback the way you always have. AOM Evolved remembers the value for that stream's HDR type, audio format, and refresh rate, then re-applies it automatically on every matching playback. Includes seek-back after adjustments, playback notifications, and a management view of everything it has learned.
